description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 6

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 5

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, Mas

This technique molds the user's chakra into extremely durable chains which can be used as weapons or to restrain target creatures.

The user creates a durable adamantine chain weapon that deals 2d4 piercing damage and has a reach of 10 feet (crit 20/x2). The user can make trip attempts with the chain. If he is tripped during his own trip attempt, he may drop the chain to avoid being tripped. However, if the chain leaves the user's grasp for whatever reason, it instantly dissipates.

The chain is considered a chakra-enhanced weapon in which the user is automatically proficient. The user can perform this technique as a full-round action to create two adamantine chains, but the chakra cost is doubled. Two-weapon fighting rules apply when wielding two chains.

Requires: Chakra Control 9 ranks

Effect: Creates 1 or more adamantine chain(s)

Mastery: At fifth level of mastery in this technique, the duration of this technique increases to 1 minute per level.
